title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Dill essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling and irritation in the digestive tract. The oil's antimicrobial properties also help to eliminate harmful bacteria that can exacerbate symptoms.
